SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-29-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-29-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC'S REPRESENTATIVE: JHONATTAN HERRADA. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL, CLERK S. LE, NOT REPORTED (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-29-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CAO, EDGAR CHOCO $571.83 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $601.83, (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
